transcript: Speaker A: सकाळची सुरुवात कशाने होते? WhatsApp. आणि दिवस संपतो कशावर? Reels. रोज ४ तास scroll करतोस... आणि मग म्हणतोस माझं English improve होत नाही. प्रॉब्लेम English ची नाही, priority ची आहे. फक्त scrolling मधून १५ मिनिटं स्वतःसाठी काढ. MySivi app download कर. इथे AI teacher आहे जो तुला मराठीतून English शिकवतो आणि लगेच चुका correct करतो. एका reel एवढ्या वेळात तू एक proper sentence शिकू शकतोस. Reels काही देत नाहीत... हे १५ मिनिटं future बदलू शकतात. 'Practice कशी करू? घरी कोणी English बोलत नाही?' MySivi वर AI teacher २४ तास available आहे. चुकलास तरी चालेल, तो correct करेल, कधी हसणार नाही. 'नंतर करतो...' हेच तू वर्षानुवर्षे म्हणतो आहेस. Trial फक्त १ रुपया. आज सुरू कर. कारण जो रोज १५ मिनिटं practice करतो, तो पुढे जातो. आजच MySivi app download कर आणि English बोलायला सुरुवात कर. [How does the morning start? WhatsApp. And how does the day end? Reels. You scroll for 4 hours every day... and then say your English isn't improving. The problem isn't English, it's priority. Just take 15 minutes out of scrolling for yourself. Download the MySivi app. Here is an AI teacher who teaches you English from Marathi and corrects mistakes immediately. In the time of one reel, you can learn a proper sentence. Reels give nothing... these 15 minutes can change your future. 'How do I practice? No one speaks English at home?' The AI teacher on MySivi is available 24 hours. Even if you make a mistake, it's fine, it will correct you and never laugh. 'I'll do it later...' you've been saying this for years. Trial is just 1 rupee. Start today. Because the one who practices 15 minutes daily goes ahead. Download the MySivi app today and start speaking English.]

summary: The ad targets Marathi speakers who spend hours scrolling social media but struggle to find time to improve their English. It introduces the MySivi app, highlighting its 24/7 AI teacher that teaches English through Marathi and corrects mistakes instantly. The ad encourages users to replace 15 minutes of scrolling with daily practice and offers a trial for just 1 rupee.
